name: Midnight Mulligans
about: Midnight Mulligans is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Nephi, UT. The facility features golf simulators that allow users to play on their schedule, improve their game with real-time feedback, and enjoy the experience with friends, free from weather constraints and long wait times. It operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, with bays available by reservation. The venue also includes a self-checkout market stocked with snacks and drinks to keep visitors energized during their visit.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 availability allows play anytime, rain or shine
Real-time swing analysis and shot tracking for game improvement
Self-checkout market with snacks and drinks available
No experience required, making it accessible for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of alcohol service available

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't explicitly mention club rentals, so it's best to bring your own clubs or check with them directly.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a self-checkout market with snacks and drinks available for purchase, but doesn't mention if outside food and drinks are allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the time for 18 holes, but indoor simulators typically allow for faster rounds compared to traditional golf.

faq.question: Is Midnight Mulligans kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue explicitly states it's an indoor golf experience everyone can enjoy and mentions family outings as a use case.
